title: Order Draft
description: Commerce v1 order draft contract. Order Draft is temporary and does not issue an official order code before customer confirmation.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 requires Order Draft to contain shipping/receiver info, payment option, total/quote validity and to remain non-official until customer confirmation.

status.description: Draft status. Prefer enums/commerce/order-status.yaml values prefixed DRAFT_.

receiver.description: Receiver and shipping information. TODO: source documents do not define PII-safe receiver field schema.

payment_option.description: Selected payment option. TODO: define official payment option enum from source docs.

official_order_code_issued.description: Must stay false for Order Draft.

blocking_reasons.description: Reasons preventing confirmation or official order creation.
